headline: Analysts Maintain Positive Outlook on Capital One Financial (COF) Amidst 25% Drop YTD
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the top financial services stocks held by hedge funds, and an upside of over 39% ranks it among the best stocks to buy now for the next 3 months.
